perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing a gray fuzzy cardigan over a black top, stands in a warehouse-style store holding a plastic container of green lettuce. She smiles and looks down at the produce. (2) The camera pans up to show green metal shelves filled with boxes of lettuce and electronic price tags showing '$ 100' and '$ 150'. (3) The woman points to the price tag and speaks to the camera, holding the lettuce container close to her face to show the label. (4) The camera shows a wide shot of the produce section with other shoppers pushing carts in the background as the woman continues her explanation.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop track plays throughout the entire video. (2) A young female voice speaks excitedly, followed by a male narrator's voice-over that sounds energetic and promotional. (3) Background ambient noise includes the metallic rattling of shopping carts and muffled voices from a crowd. (4) There are no specific sound effects, but the vocal ratio is high as the dialogue and narration lead the audio experience.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the top (Decorative/Brand). (2) '等一下 你怎麼笑成這樣' (Wait, why are you smiling like that?) - Hook text with a humorous tone. (3) '大特價 不定期折扣 太便宜 好市多生菜' (Big sale, irregular discounts, too cheap, Costco lettuce) - Functional text highlighting the deal. (4) '$ 100' and '$ 150' on price tags - Functional price information. (5) '好市多現在生菜超值得買哦 趕快來買' (Costco lettuce is super worth buying now, come quickly) - CTA text with an enthusiastic tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro with person -> Close-up of products/prices -> Price comparison explanation -> Call to action.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 female shopper in background, 1 male shopper in background, 1 other person partially visible.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a grey fluffy jacket and a black shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Industrial warehouse shelving with orange and green metal frames, stacked cardboard boxes of produce, and other shoppers with carts.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Item Discovery -> Price Comparison -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to inform viewers about a specific discount on fresh produce at Costco. By showing the visual evidence of low prices ($100-$150) and comparing them to higher prices at other retailers like Carrefour, the creator creates a sense of urgency and value to persuade viewers to visit the store.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showing of brand logos (Costco), product pricing, and a strong verbal recommendation to buy.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy voice-over combined with fast-paced editing and variety-show style large captions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a typical 'smart shopper' persona common in social media short-form content, leveraging price sensitivity and FOMO (fear of missing out).
